name: fable-mode
description: A documentation-only Codex plugin that adds one reusable skill for careful engineering work, integrated design thinking, disciplined tool use, verification-first implementation, and concise reporting.

interface.shortDescription: Use one careful Codex workflow for engineering and UI design
interface.longDescription: Fable Mode is an unofficial, original, provider-neutral Codex skill for deliberate task framing, disciplined tool use, explicit assumptions, engineering implementation, integrated design thinking for UI/frontend work, verification-first delivery, and concise final reporting. It is documentation-only and adds no tools, servers, hooks, network calls, dependencies, or telemetry.
defaultPrompt: Use $fable-mode to frame the task, inspect context, choose the engineering or design lane, verify assumptions, run relevant checks, and report changes, validation, risks, and assumptions.
Use $fable-mode to redesign this UI with product-level design thinking. Avoid generic card-grid, border-heavy, badge-heavy, eyebrow-label patterns. Explore three directions before implementation.
